title: Stay connected
text: Social media tools Want to stay connected with the Competition Bureau's news and special updates? These tools will deliver important information through the online channels that you use. Be sure to check our Interacting With Us on Social Media Guidelines. RSS Feeds Stay in touch by subscribing to our RSS Feeds . Twitter Follow the Competition Bureau on Twitter . YouTube Watch the Competition Bureau's videos on YouTube . Facebook Join the Competition Bureau community on Facebook . LinkedIn Expand your network by following us on LinkedIn . Electronic Distribution List Subscribe to/Unsubscribe from the Competition Bureau Electronic Distribution List.
